title: satureja × thymifolia
intro: Satureja × thymifolia, also known as wild marjoram or lemon thyme, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and leaves that resemble those of thyme. The medicinal properties of Satureja × thymifolia include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. Satureja × thymifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and oils, and is often used in traditional medicine and cooking.
